rationale: No host_permissions: tools run entirely in the extension page; any future feature that performs background fetches to arbitrary URLs would need an explicit host permission and review.

mobile_install.note: Chrome extensions are not used for Android/iOS install; the PWA manifest and Add to Home Screen apply to the deployed web URL.

tools.details: All current tools operate on pasted text, uploaded files, or generated snippets in-page. No tool performs automatic cross-origin network access from the extension background. Curl Visualizer and similar only emit code strings; they do not execute fetch to user URLs without separate manifest permissions if added later.
